message:
test(google-docs): add happy-path connector suite + fcp-e2e dev-dep

Mirrors the amplitude/qq/capability-rejection suite added in the prior
commit, extending the same wiremock-based suite-style harness to the
google-docs connector.

Changes:
- connectors/google-docs/tests/connector_suite_happy_path.rs (new, 9.2 KB)
  Exercises GoogleDocsConnector through handshake -> simulate -> invoke
  against wiremock-served Google Docs API fixtures.
- connectors/google-docs/Cargo.toml: add fcp-e2e dev-dep (path).
- Cargo.lock: record the new fcp-e2e edge in the resolution graph.

No production code changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
